summary: Completed testing of MANO Iteration 10 features: Family Panel (/family-admin), Enterprise Dashboard (/enterprise), Admin Subscriptions tab. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 3 pages load correctly with proper functionality.

minor.issue: Some users have 'id' field while others have 'user_id' - inconsistent schema

integration_issues.issue: Transient 'Error de conexión' toast appeared during plan change, but operation completed successfully

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login with admin@mano.com / Admin123! works
GET /api/family/dashboard - Requires authentication (401)
GET /api/family/dashboard - Returns members, alerts, stats, has_family_plan
POST /api/family/members - Requires authentication (401)
POST /api/family/members - Successfully creates family member
POST /api/family/members - Creates senior member with simplified mode
PATCH /api/family/members/{id} - Updates family member
DELETE /api/family/members/{id} - Deletes family member
GET /api/enterprise/dashboard - Requires authentication (401)
GET /api/enterprise/dashboard - Returns summary with total_analyzed, threats_blocked, protection_rate, money_saved, active_employees
GET /api/enterprise/dashboard - Returns risk_distribution (critical, high, medium, low)
GET /api/enterprise/dashboard - Returns departments with name, employee_count, threats_blocked, risk_score
GET /api/enterprise/dashboard - Returns 30 days trend_data
GET /api/enterprise/reports - Requires authentication (401)
GET /api/enterprise/reports - Returns report with period, total_threats, blocked, by_type, by_risk
GET /api/enterprise/reports - Works for all periods (week, month, quarter, year)
GET /api/admin/subscriptions - Requires authentication (401)
GET /api/admin/subscriptions - Returns subscribers, stats, recent_changes
GET /api/admin/users - Returns users list with pagination
PATCH /api/admin/users/{user_id}/plan - Requires authentication (401)
PATCH /api/admin/users/{user_id}/plan - Rejects invalid plan (400)
PATCH /api/admin/users/{user_id}/plan - Successfully updates plan for all valid plans
Frontend: Family Panel loads at /family-admin with stats and members
Frontend: Add Member dialog opens with all fields (name, relationship, phone, email, is_senior, simplified_mode, alert_level)
Frontend: Existing member 'Abuela María' displayed with Mayor and Modo Simple badges
Frontend: Enterprise Dashboard loads at /enterprise with metrics and departments
Frontend: Admin Panel loads at /admin with 9 tabs
Frontend: Suscripciones tab shows users with plan dropdowns
Frontend: Plan change via dropdown works (tested free -> family -> free)
critical_code_review_comments: Family dashboard endpoint correctly returns members, alerts, stats structure at /api/family/dashboard
Family members CRUD operations work correctly (POST, PATCH, DELETE)
Enterprise dashboard returns comprehensive metrics including summary, risk_distribution, departments, trend_data
Admin subscriptions endpoint returns premium users with stats and recent_changes
Admin plan update endpoint validates plans and logs changes correctly
Frontend Family Panel shows stats (Miembros, Mayores Protegidos, Amenazas Bloqueadas, Alertas Pendientes)
Frontend Enterprise Dashboard shows real-time metrics with En Vivo indicator
Frontend Admin Panel has all 9 tabs: Inversores, Usuarios, Suscripciones, Pagos, Descargas, Tiempo Real, WhatsApp, API Keys, Base de Datos
seed_data_creation: Test family members created and cleaned up during testing. Existing member 'Abuela María' preserved.

mocked_apis.banking_service: Banking integration is SIMULATED - does not connect to real banks
mocked_apis.departments: Enterprise departments are SIMULATED (Dirección, Finanzas, Comercial, IT, RRHH)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 features fully tested: Family Panel at /family-admin shows stats and members with CRUD operations. Enterprise Dashboard at /enterprise shows metrics, risk distribution, departments (SIMULATED), and 30-day trend. Admin Panel at /admin has 9 tabs including Suscripciones for manual plan management. Admin credentials: admin@mano.com / Admin123!. Existing family member 'Abuela María' (senior, simplified mode) is present.
